guesses.pointingFact: Smaller fabless semiconductor designer reopening accounts against larger rivals in a 2019 product-cycle window
Fabless chip designer competing across computing markets without owning leading-edge fabs
Specialist semiconductor designer reliant on external manufacturing and competing with larger suppliers
Semiconductor designer with multi-market computing exposure and foundry dependence
Fabless chip company competing in computing-related markets against larger platform suppliers

guesses.pointingFact: Spring 2019 certification/grounding crisis for a large passenger-aircraft maker with major defense and space businesses
Commercial aerospace OEM in a duopoly structure with large installed base and military work
Aerospace manufacturer exposed to passenger-aircraft delivery freezes and supplier constraints
Major defense and aerospace manufacturer, but weaker fit to commercial certification crisis
Aerospace/defense manufacturer with systems businesses, not the passenger-aircraft grounding story

guesses.pointingFact: Home-entertainment OS sold via low-margin hardware and devices, monetized through ads and content distribution, built into TVs and external streamers.
